'''Mimas Yoon''' was a [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomat]] whose assassination was ordered by [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]] at some point during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Revan supposedly saw Yoon as being of vital importance to the stability of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1stm}}
